recommendations.title: A Little Princess

recommendations.title: Perfect Sisters
recommendations.overview: Tired of their mother's alcoholism and a string of her abusive boyfriends, two sisters plot to kill her.

recommendations.title: Sara's Notebook
recommendations.overview: Laura has spent years looking for her sister Sara who went missing in the depths of the jungle in the Congo. Neither the NGO she works for, nor the embassy, have news on her whereabouts until a photo appears of Sara in a mining town. Apparently, Sara

recommendations.title: As Good as It Gets
recommendations.overview: A misanthropic author, a single mother and waitress, and a gay artist form an unlikely friendship after the artist is assaulted in a robbery.

recommendations.title: Terms of Endearment
recommendations.overview: Aurora, a finicky woman, is in search of true love while her daughter faces marital issues. Together, they help each other deal with problems and find reasons to live a joyful life.

recommendations.title: Songbird
recommendations.overview: During a pandemic lockdown, Nico, a young man with rare immunity, must overcome martial law, murderous vigilantes and a powerful family to reunite with his love, Sara.

recommendations.title: Xico's Journey
recommendations.overview: The peace of a small town is endangered when a corporation wants to destroy the mountain that protects them. A girl named Copi and her best friend Xico, a Xoloitzcuintle dog, will go into the mountains to try to save the town.

recommendations.title: The Roommate

recommendations.title: Beethoven's 5th
recommendations.overview: When Sara takes Beethoven to spend summer vacation with wacky Uncle Freddie in an old mining town, the mischievous canine "digs up" the missing clue to a legendary hidden fortune of Rita and Moe Selig. Now everybody wants to be the dog's best friend
